name: Belly of the beast
description: You are inside the ribcage of the long-dead beast. Leathery walls press close. The only light comes from a narrow fissure above, casting dim grey shadows. It smells of old death and deep earth. The opening above leads back out. There is a path down.
ambient: Something drips steadily in the dark.
The walls creak and settle around you, as if breathing.
